base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of stage_guts_man — a tile (level_layout) from 1987 mega man. Guts Man stage — moving platform over bottomless pit (infamous glitch-prone section). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
